name: Network AI
description: Multi-agent swarm orchestrator for AI workflows. Exposes blackboard read/write, agent dispatch, permission gating (AuthGuardian), token budget enforcement (FederatedBudget), and audit log tools over MCP. Supports 14 AI framework adapters including LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI, Codex, and A2A — mix any frameworks in one swarm with race-condition-safe shared state.

tools.name: blackboard_read
tools.description: Read a value from the shared agent blackboard by key

tools.name: blackboard_write
tools.description: Write a value to the shared agent blackboard (propose → validate → commit)

tools.name: blackboard_list
tools.description: List all keys currently stored on the blackboard

tools.name: blackboard_delete
tools.description: Delete a key from the shared blackboard

tools.name: agent_spawn
tools.description: Spawn a new agent in the swarm

tools.name: agent_stop
tools.description: Stop a running agent in the swarm

tools.name: agent_list
tools.description: List all registered agents and their current status

tools.name: auth_issue_token
tools.description: Issue a scoped permission token for an agent (AuthGuardian)

tools.name: auth_revoke_token
tools.description: Revoke a previously issued permission token

tools.name: auth_check_permission
tools.description: Check whether an agent token has a specific permission

tools.name: budget_get
tools.description: Get current token spend for an agent (FederatedBudget)

tools.name: budget_set_ceiling
tools.description: Set a hard token ceiling for an agent

tools.name: audit_log_query
tools.description: Query the HMAC-signed audit log for blackboard writes, permission events, and FSM transitions

tools.name: fsm_transition
tools.description: Trigger a finite-state-machine governance transition for an agent workflow

tools.name: fsm_get_state
tools.description: Get the current FSM state of a workflow
